differential_diagnoses: Autoimmune hemolytic anemia (AIHA) secondary to underlying lymphoproliferative disorder
next_steps: Peripheral blood flow cytometry for PNH (CD55/CD59)
Bone marrow biopsy with cytogenetics and flow cytometry
Reticulocyte count, haptoglobin, and serum LDH/bilirubin monitoring
Vitamin B12, folate, methylmalonic acid, and homocysteine levels
Iron studies and total iron-binding capacity
Dermatology consultation for skin hypopigmentation evaluation
